entity.summary: Ethereum decentralized exchange application associated with the HELLO Labs ecosystem and represented by a dedicated trade subdomain and independent exchange registry entry.
entity.notes: The dedicated HELLO Labs trade subdomain is preserved as the exchange identity and the current HELLO Labs parent site remains reachable. CoinGecko candidate data independently identifies Hello DEX (Ethereum) under the trade.thehellolabs.com domain. Confidence is medium and URL status is live_unverified because the trade endpoint could not be fully fetched in this review pass.

evidence.title: HELLO Labs official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party HELLO Labs parent site is reachable and documents the HELLO Protocol and ecosystem infrastructure context.

evidence.title: Hello DEX trading endpoint
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party trade subdomain is preserved as the exchange endpoint; the endpoint could not be fully fetched during this review pass, so HEI does not promote the URL status beyond live_unverified.

evidence.title: Hello DEX Ethereum exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus identifies Hello DEX (Ethereum) under the trade.thehellolabs.com domain, corroborating the separate exchange surface identity.
